proposedChange: Add source-public approval rehearsal module with deterministic packets, evidence bundles, and GO_CANDIDATE/NO_GO/NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL decision output

safetyGates.label: No production deploy, restart, or live service mutation
No Gateway, broker, or worker restart
No live provider send (Telegram, Signal, etc.)
No terminal ACK or read-receipt claim
No secret disclosure or repository visibility change
No repository history rewrite or force-push
No release publication, community post, or npm publish
No automatic merge or approval without explicit operator approval
No approval execution — rehearsal round only
This round produces approval packets only, never executes

decisionReason: All safety gates passed. Rehearsal packet produced. Operator must explicitly approve before executing any source-public change.
abortPaths: Abort: delete the approval rehearsal packet and evidence bundle from the output directory.
Abort: discard this branch — no code or config changes have been deployed.
Abort: operator may decide not to approve the candidate. No state has been mutated.
Abort: the rehearsal packet is advisory; discard and re-run with corrected inputs.
rollbackPaths: Rollback: no state was mutated during this rehearsal round — nothing to roll back.
Rollback: the evidence bundle is self-contained under the output directory; remove the directory to clean up.
Rollback: before approval execution, verify the packet decision and evidence bundle are consistent.
